name: Do No Significant Harm (DNSH) assessment

regulatory_anchors.article: Article 2(17)(b) (DNSH constituent of the sustainable investment definition)
Annex II / Annex III (DNSH sections of the pre-contractual templates)

summary: Tests whether the project demonstrates that it does no significant harm to any environmental or social objective in pursuit of the promoted E/S characteristic (Art 8) or sustainable investment objective (Art 9). DNSH is assessed at the project level under PB's developer-focused framing.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), DNSH is expected to be retained as a core safeguard across the new category regime. PB Art 8/Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.3 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
